name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: have a minute?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
Friend, this is important. We have just a few hours to go before our huge Federal Election Commission deadline, and we're so close to our $30,000 goal.

If just 100 more grassroots donors step up, we'll hit our goal and make it clear just how many people are joining us in our fight to take back the Senate.

Every day we're fighting to make progress on the key challenges that face our country and our world. From global climate change to ending the scourge of gun violence to building an economy that works for everyone and not just the rich, we're building a movement to confront these issues head-on. I hope you will join this movement at this critical moment.

Please, use this link to contribute now: [**http://action.vanhollen.org/september**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91fcc/70cdc2ba/47aa941a/39626bc/3921824450/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_eom815?refcode=em093015_3nd&amount=5.00&recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+httpactionvanhollenorgseptember&utm_campaign=em93015_2ND&source=em93015_2ND")

Thanks for everything,

Chris

| Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91fcc/70cdc2ba/47aa941a/39626b2/3921824450/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em93015_2ND&source=em93015_2ND") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages, please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.

name: Team Bernie
subject: [Deadline] Why we ask
body:
#
Friend -
**Here 's the truth:** we've sent a number of emails about this fundraising deadline because Bernie doesn't go around asking millionaires and billionaires for money. This is how we fund our campaign. So when you see our poll numbers rise, and see our organization grow in states around the country -- it's these requests that make that possible.
Chip in $3 before the midnight FEC deadline as a way of saying you have had enough of the billionaire class buying our elections:
**[https://go.berniesanders.com/FEC-deadline](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2534/43f17890/568dc0dc/621fe1a7/1471745443/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/1-million?refcode=em150930pm2-full")**
Since day one, the strength of our campaign has always been from the people who power our political revolution. So when we report our fundraising numbers, **it 's not just about _how much money_ we raise, it's about _how many contributions _our supporters have made to own a piece of our campaign.**
Thank you for stepping up today. It's important.
Bernie 2016

[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2534/43f17890/568dc0dc/621fe1a7/1471745443/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/1-million?refcode=em150930pm2-full")

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2534/43f17890/568dc0dc/621fe1a4/1471745443/VEsF/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2534/43f17890/568dc0dc/621fe1a5/1471745443/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2534/43f17890/568dc0dc/621fe1a2/1471745443/VEsD/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2534/43f17890/568dc0dc/621fe1a3/1471745443/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

Chip in $3 before the midnight FEC deadline as a way of saying you have had enough of the billionaire class buying our elections: "" Since day one, the strength of our campaign has always been from the people who power our political revolution. So when we report our fundraising numbers, it 's not just about how much money we raise, it's about how many contributions our supporters have made to own a piece of our campaign. Thank you for stepping up today. It's important. Bernie 2016 "" Paid for by Bernie 2016 PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE

name: Bill Clinton
subject: If you're with Hillary
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Midnight deadline to help Hillary | Hey --

I've said this before, but it bears repeating:

Hillary is the most capable public servant I've ever worked with.

She'd make us proud as president -- focusing on finding solutions to the the challenges that keep families across America up worrying at night.

**Will you help elect her by donating $1 before midnight tonight?**

| [**Donate $1**](https://www.hillaryclinton.com/donate/deadline/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=ses&utm_campaign=20150930_wjc2_full)
---

Thanks,

Bill

---

Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185

name: Jeb Bush
subject: Wow
body:
Friend - we did it.

I'm humbled by the outpouring of support over the last few days.

Thousands of you stepped up to help us meet (actually, beat!) our fundraising goal for the quarter, and I just wanted to take a minute to say thank you.

Here are a few of the highlights from the campaign trail that your support fueled:
* I unveiled detailed policy proposals to get our country growing again, including plans to overhaul our tax code, reform the nation's burdensome regulations and harness the American energy revolution.
* We launched our very first television ad thanks to the generosity of supporters like you.
* I received more than 700 endorsements in just the last few weeks from conservative leaders across the country.

Because of you, we're entering a critical phase of this campaign stronger than ever.

Thank you for being a part of the team -- every voice and every dollar make a difference.

Onward to victory,

Jeb

P.S. Didn't make the deadline? We still need your support: [**Jeb2016.com/donate/**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/ycsryfvtcgknmwmsnfzrcnpwvvnptwytrfbfktwlmgfc_ufpnnmcy.html)

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/rwjfyklbwvgpjsjcpkqfwphsllphbsybfktkgbsrjvkl_ufpnnmcy.html)
Paid for by Jeb 2016, Inc.
Jeb 2016, Inc. PO Box 440641 Miami, FL 33144
[Unsubscribe](http://www.email.jeb2016.com/Unsub.do?a=u&e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&mid=4256&sid=DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&rid=55890&lid=87)

| Dear Friend,

This afternoon Ted will join Howie Carr and Mark Levin on the radio and we wanted to make sure you didn't miss it.

At 5:35 pm ET, Ted will be live with Howie Carr. **[You can listen here](http://em.tedcruz.org/wf/click?upn=TEeb5-2FMuQyoelyZpsAGcFH8wI7AW82FAmDbpJZdR7KpUAw3xWTz4oeQD3JOeH4qC_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCEbgYMVdOeqdqQLNf3CJ8VQcY9SEYm6nvB6higKlsOrxSkgTwhtq3G6AXTAjQXpqHRFR4I1K8zsCiu-2B6kORSUVDRZNxdIzcm7yiGHopHfedqk6Opz7hkDPTlAHHGm-2BiAFJnKsGJmSRMOrAw-2BUycJCxnKlUk0yXX8jGqK6iFDOExaejEESMlIxVzzJ9fabED9qPgEDkiwlb5Df-2FEMgcXUGVDN5pJqRAdHoq-2BnBgbB3-2BFplT1Gv2ddLhwsMM8rCpS-2FJjksjhG4BBFBCabTuZe-2Fhg9VrsWmxyazKkoAx7Kwr3bA1fEgYuoTp9ItmuE6wkIKC-2B9tV01QoZThlj90nxIoDJROoaLelLoBok8rZT7g1y2s7n1o5-2F5Z9oXmKcsQ4FbZw4-3D)**.

Then at 8:20 pm ET, Ted will join Mark Levin. **[Listen live here](http://em.tedcruz.org/wf/click?upn=Va-2FhZr24tgu-2BoX97ct0K2QOidLl-2FazT-2Fk-2FKjKGJfzYZt74Gdb-2B7gXY32BU8Q6yRA_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCEbgYMVdOeqdqQLNf3CJ8VQ6HMa8k-2BMP2cTx5wW7291a7a5LNUJre9ezFlx8y7kKkx6dAYF4-2BDvtrANJvDTRHPsqgFwac-2FBplZC5jez3pjoVDwamln-2BTq0yb1O50dqsnfjMuGRohfVAo26Wl-2BEIynSB0tgOFa7Dfb-2FIr4uJMWB22-2FQUWbfb-2BYl7TK1Ii-2FFkkfm-2FhWDJtRK-2B5C0EWeviGtlojAjpVW3B0-2F6uzGuIou-2B80ms27drFt-2F2BQsf2QovwnZzJRRpAFcu-2B52GSWz388TSp59kvYa2BMh608FIOA1sg56h1fd67rvME0oX4iUO-2Fcg4ReSwv1xMsOPG1VlspZr9kfBOxQSWgMqn-2B0OtB7SsLMiaSSx1C4Ng3D4ij4K3-2Fv9g-3D)**.

And as a bonus, Ted will also [be on the Glenn Beck Program tomorrow morning](http://em.tedcruz.org/wf/click?upn=Va-2FhZr24tgu-2BoX97ct0K2QOidLl-2FazT-2Fk-2FKjKGJfzYZDmV9O9oDklyitoam8G2LU_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCEbgYMVdOeqdqQLNf3CJ8VQ8F8zgqi4Tj33ktcQKcKCDmPh2tC7F3wtWcDWpoIJZc6WZp-2FINMDVz9R08cTizMTqaInBjLu4Vff01-2FiXmCteCioMR1bp0n3va7O3VPNm0Cx-2FnB8AveULE16tN1WDUxm3SorbzMPoqkjv3Vg7HUzHnu4Iyaxqod97ukAhT3gG8X4vdJ7zY5grILeuJJXvPByHI-2BZOMqP7k9xwaHKwmb-2BFNyQuxGQBmxHo-2FkS4Zr-2F-2BBmkuqd5WiCyU0I5majRjxMFCSWD2G0smszvByie3tWmSw6EuP7dLyUPPBd7qjYujTwn3MNx6Iivwqe8LmViab4vep-2FIog1sX5-2FsxeYKV6JnPASeu03S-2FUYXG7AEyohtDaxw-3D) which goes on air at 9 am ET.

We hope you'll tune in and tell your friends!

For Liberty,

Team Cruz

P.S. Did you hear what [Rush Limbaugh said about Ted yesterday](http://em.tedcruz.org/wf/click?upn=oxRiKmNZf-2B-2FjHRySYBDLyx-2FfYGqyCM1A1cRZnLoHNvDhcydHiHajdHPy01DTe-2BC288rtsRszno7il3GVr6ErEw-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCEbgYMVdOeqdqQLNf3CJ8VQvkI9OaJWVl5UxGDSlsdRzFypZO9JG6fMpDHaWRyZnGZpLlNYozwf70IzFR-2FD-2BKU2AxlqKvXzCN9SsvPAnKfj1zcyTqVULew8OU-2F1pl8hDJumOmAYx-2BRY6cvgThsbwOFI1jsF-2BsovbfKDVDoY-2FGtRhAogAMEnK-2BwJ-2F-2BTGXJustI38YIcsy0v-2BrxsSSRnSqgNuvY9Ou-2FcO-2BQRROBuorNQi-2BrpifQmf85aU-2FM1SQPbr68K86YxM0P6r3T7kSzSFrz8YcxBkXDwnQ5WCYbFtqqhTPoQYG48QSgpT17RykJ-2BR-2Fdudi7pbrG0VSm0qPRYCA9M25yxEvuPZEoruaLiJ-2FZ4oMk-2FSeztp5sZvkUSAtOoA4fM-3D)? At 5:35 pm ET, Ted will be live with Howie Carr. . Then at 8:20 pm ET, Ted will join Mark Levin. . And as a bonus, Ted will also which goes on air at 9 am ET. We hope you'll tune in and tell your friends! For Liberty, Team Cruz P.S. name: Robby Mook, Official Clinton Campaign
subject: WATCH: A strategy update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Here's where we're at: | Friend --

Wow. This week, the campaign team was sprinting hard to hit our end-of-quarter fundraising goals, and because of another amazing team -- one you’re a part of -- we surpassed every last one of them. Thank you so much. You're the best.

You all contributed more than $28 million to this campaign this quarter, which brings our total to above $75 million! I'm so grateful that you have Hillary's back -- and believe me, so is she.

I would love to say thank you in person, but since I can't do that, I did the next best thing: I made you a video. **[Take a look to get an inside peek at our strategy for the rest of 2015, then add your name to commit to the next phase of the campaign:](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjM2NTE2MjES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYwMTQ5OTI4S0&mt=1&rt=0)** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjM2NTE2MjES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYwMTQ5OTI4S0&mt=1&rt=0)
This team is incredibly special, and I'm thrilled you're a part of it. Together, we're going to get Hillary all the way to the White House:

**[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/state-of-the-race/](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjM2NTE2MjES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYwMTQ5OTI4S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Thanks,

Robby

Robby Mook
Campaign Manager
Hillary for America

| **Did someone forward this email to you?[Add your name here to get more like it!](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=18&ms=MjM2NTE2MjES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYwMTQ5OTI4S0&mt=1&rt=0)** | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjM2NTE2MjES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYwMTQ5OTI4S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjM2NTE2MjES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYwMTQ5OTI4S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjM2NTE2MjES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYwMTQ5OTI4S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjM2NTE2MjES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYwMTQ5OTI4S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjM2NTE2MjES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYwMTQ5OTI4S0&mt=1&rt=0). Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjM2NTE2MjES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYwMTQ5OTI4S0&mt=1&rt=0)
